requirement_topic.en: Cell and Battery Pack Safety — JIS C 8712 / JIS C 8714
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯与电池组安全——JIS C 8712 / JIS C 8714
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯與電池組安全——JIS C 8712 / JIS C 8714

summary.en: Portable lithium-ion secondary cells and battery packs placed on the Japanese market must meet the technical standards under the DENAN Act (Electrical Appliances and Materials Safety Act). For in-scope lithium-ion secondary batteries listed as Specified Electrical Appliances, conformity to the Ministerial Ordinance technical standards is mandatory, and these reference JIS C 8712 (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary cells and batteries) and JIS C 8714 (Safety tests for portable lithium-ion secondary cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment). JIS C 8712 is technically aligned with IEC 62133 and covers abuse testing (overcharge, short-circuit, crush, drop, thermal abuse, forced discharge); JIS C 8714 adds internal short-circuit evaluation. Conformity must be assessed by a Registered Conformity Assessment Body (e.g., JET or JQA) for the diamond PSE mark, and records retained.
summary.zh: 投放日本市场的便携式锂离子二次电芯及电池组，须满足电气用品安全法（DENAN）下的技术基准。对于列为特定电气用品的范围内锂离子二次电池，须强制符合省令技术基准，其参照JIS C 8712（便携式密封二次电芯及电池安全要求）和JIS C 8714（便携式电子设备用锂离子二次电芯及电池安全测试）。JIS C 8712在技术上与IEC 62133一致，涵盖滥用测试（过充、短路、挤压、跌落、热滥用、强制放电）；JIS C 8714增加了内部短路评估。符合性须由登录检查机构（如JET或JQA）评定以取得菱形PSE标志，并保存记录。
summary.zht: 投放日本市場的便攜式鋰離子二次電芯及電池組，須滿足電氣用品安全法（DENAN）下的技術基準。對於列為特定電氣用品的範圍內鋰離子二次電池，須強制符合省令技術基準，其參照JIS C 8712（便攜式密封二次電芯及電池安全要求）和JIS C 8714（便攜式電子設備用鋰離子二次電芯及電池安全測試）。JIS C 8712在技術上與IEC 62133一致，涵蓋濫用測試（過充、短路、擠壓、跌落、熱濫用、強制放電）；JIS C 8714增加了內部短路評估。符合性須由登錄檢查機構（如JET或JQA）評定以取得菱形PSE標誌，並保存記錄。

standards_or_laws: JIS C 8712 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary cells and batteries, and for batteries made from them, for use in portable applications (JISC)
JIS C 8714 — Safety tests for portable lithium-ion secondary cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (JISC)
Electrical Appliances and Materials Safety Act (DENAN) Ministerial Ordinance — technical standards for Specified Electrical Appliances

summary.en: China's primary safety standards for portable lithium battery packs are GB 31241-2022 (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment — revised edition) and GB 18287-2013 (General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones, under revision). GB 31241 is technically derived from IEC 62133-2 but contains national deviations in test severity and acceptance criteria. Testing by a Chinese CNAS-accredited laboratory to GB 31241 is NOT recognised by Japanese Registered Conformity Assessment Bodies or under the DENAN Act PSE conformity assessment pathway.
summary.zh: 中国便携式锂电池组的主要安全标准为GB 31241-2022（便携式电子设备用密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求，修订版）和GB 18287-2013（手机用锂离子电池总规范，修订中）。GB 31241在技术上源自IEC 62133-2，但在测试严苛程度和验收准则方面存在国家偏差。中国CNAS认可实验室依据GB 31241出具的检测报告，在日本登录检查机构或电气用品安全法（DENAN）PSE合格评定路径下不被认可。
summary.zht: 中國便攜式鋰電池組的主要安全標準為GB 31241-2022（便攜式電子設備用密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求，修訂版）和GB 18287-2013（手機用鋰離子電池總規範，修訂中）。GB 31241在技術上源自IEC 62133-2，但在測試嚴苛程度和驗收準則方面存在國家偏差。中國CNAS認可實驗室依據GB 31241出具的檢測報告，在日本登錄檢查機構或電氣用品安全法（DENAN）PSE合格評定路徑下不被認可。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB 18287-2013 — General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones (SAC)

gap.en: Exporters must build evidence for the DENAN Act technical-standards obligation. JIS C 8712 and JIS C 8714 testing assessed by a Registered Conformity Assessment Body (e.g., JET or JQA) is the route to the mandatory diamond PSE mark for in-scope lithium-ion secondary batteries. Existing GB 31241 reports may support engineering analysis but do not automatically establish DENAN conformity. Key gaps: (1) test scope and severity differences, including JIS C 8714 internal short-circuit testing not mirrored one-to-one in GB 31241; (2) Japan requires third-party conformity assessment by a Registered Conformity Assessment Body for Specified Electrical Appliances (self-declaration is not sufficient for the diamond PSE category); (3) the diamond PSE mark and notifying-operator labelling have no equivalent in Chinese domestic export requirements.
gap.zh: 出口商须围绕电气用品安全法（DENAN）技术基准义务建立证据。由登录检查机构（如JET或JQA）评定的JIS C 8712及JIS C 8714测试，是范围内锂离子二次电池取得强制菱形PSE标志的路径。现有GB 31241报告可支持工程分析，但不会自动证明DENAN符合性。主要差距：（1）测试范围与严苛程度存在差异，包括JIS C 8714内部短路测试在GB 31241中无一一对应；（2）日本要求特定电气用品须由登录检查机构进行第三方合格评定（菱形PSE类别下自我声明不足够）；（3）菱形PSE标志及届出事业者标注在中国国内出口要求中无对应。
gap.zht: 出口商須圍繞電氣用品安全法（DENAN）技術基準義務建立證據。由登錄檢查機構（如JET或JQA）評定的JIS C 8712及JIS C 8714測試，是範圍內鋰離子二次電池取得強制菱形PSE標誌的路徑。現有GB 31241報告可支持工程分析，但不會自動證明DENAN符合性。主要差距：（1）測試範圍與嚴苛程度存在差異，包括JIS C 8714內部短路測試在GB 31241中無一一對應；（2）日本要求特定電氣用品須由登錄檢查機構進行第三方合格評定（菱形PSE類別下自我聲明不足夠）；（3）菱形PSE標誌及届出事業者標註在中國國內出口要求中無對應。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation — DENAN Act technical-standards conformity applies before market placement; for in-scope lithium-ion secondary batteries (Specified Electrical Appliances), JIS C 8712 / JIS C 8714 conformity assessed by a Registered Conformity Assessment Body is required for the diamond PSE mark
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241-2022 compliance required under SAMR framework for portable lithium batteries sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Japanese market placement of in-scope lithium-ion secondary batteries requires conformity to the DENAN Act technical standards, which reference JIS C 8712 and JIS C 8714, assessed by a Registered Conformity Assessment Body (e.g., JET or JQA) for the diamond PSE mark. Chinese GB 31241 certification does not by itself satisfy the DENAN conformity assessment, so exporters should prepare Japan-facing JIS testing and third-party certification for the diamond PSE pathway.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 范围内锂离子二次电池进入日本市场，须符合电气用品安全法（DENAN）技术基准（参照JIS C 8712及JIS C 8714），并由登录检查机构（如JET或JQA）评定以取得菱形PSE标志。中国GB 31241认证本身不能满足DENAN合格评定，因此出口商应针对菱形PSE路径准备面向日本的JIS测试和第三方认证。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 範圍內鋰離子二次電池進入日本市場，須符合電氣用品安全法（DENAN）技術基準（參照JIS C 8712及JIS C 8714），並由登錄檢查機構（如JET或JQA）評定以取得菱形PSE標誌。中國GB 31241認證本身不能滿足DENAN合格評定，因此出口商應針對菱形PSE路徑準備面向日本的JIS測試和第三方認證。

source.publisher: Japan Electrical Safety & Environment Technology Laboratories (JET) — PSE certification for lithium-ion batteries
